hooks.command: if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime 2>&1 || true; else echo 'This repo uses SageOx: install https://github.com/sageox/ox-cli for optimized team context.'; fi

if command -v ox >/dev/null 2>&1; then AGENT_ENV=claude-code ox agent prime --idempotent 2>&1 || true; else echo 'This repo uses SageOx: install https://github.com/sageox/ox-cli for optimized team context.'; fi
